title: Saccocalyx lupulinus
taxonomy: Saccocalyx lupulinus is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It belongs to the genus Saccocalyx and the kingdom Plantae. The classification of Saccocalyx lupulinus further breaks down into the following taxonomy: Kingdom: Plantae, Family: Aizoaceae, Genus: Saccocalyx, Species: S. lupulinus. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis. Saccocalyx lupulinus is native to the Arabian Peninsula.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine to exhibit potential health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
